---
title: "NFL Blogging"
subtitle: "Living the Dream"
image: pics/profile.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/jdpretorius123
    - icon: twitter-x
      href: https://x.com/jdpretorius_
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/justin-p-996555172/
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:justin2025@gmail.com
---

## The Mission
Blogging about the NFL is my desire to work in the league that I love.
